title: Alm's Fungal Infection Ammo Crafting Additions
description: This Datapack adds and modifies recipes for The Fungal Infection survival modpack. this also removes a few recipes as well and balance some
body:
This Datapack largely removes all recipes from Tacz\_c in the fungal infection modpack as ammo is either crafted there via Tacz\_c or via finding it in bunkers. Those recipes are not needed and as such, needs to be nuked from the pack. Most of the recipes removed are from ammo types not used in the fungal infection as it doesnt use them, those weapons have been removed from the pack through other means.

Initially made for Fungal infection, if you want to load this datapack i recommend paxi.
